query:
SELECT DISTINCT ON (mf.id) mf.id, e.event->>'error' AS error
            FROM media_files mf
            JOIN events e
              ON e.media_file_id = mf.id
             AND e.event->>'type' = 'transcode_failed'
            WHERE mf.workflow_state = 'failed'
            ORDER BY mf.id, e.id DESC
